# Best Practices Snapshot

- Source: <https://agentskills.io/skill-creation/best-practices>
- Retrieved: 2026-04-01

## Key points

- Add what the agent lacks; omit generic knowledge.
- Design coherent units rather than splitting tightly related instructions.
- Prefer defaults over long menus of options.
- Favor procedures, gotchas sections, checklists, and validation loops.
- Use progressive disclosure for large skills and keep `SKILL.md` at moderate detail.

## BitSearch implications

- Merge routing rules and workflow rules into one coherent BitSearch research skill.
- Add a gotchas section and explicit validation loop to the skill body.
- Keep examples and detailed rules in `references/`, not in the main body.
